text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I can't believe I screwed up like that...
choice_data_list: Let's call it a day before it gets worse.
Just be careful from now on.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on! It's not that big of a deal!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I know you're still going to worry, though... Fine.
I'll rest up for today, but you'd better be grateful!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And we'd better get right back to work tomorrow,
you hear?! I'll need to train even harder to make
up for lost time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I treat her injury, we agree to take the rest
of the day off—just to be safe.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, obviously. That's what I was gonna do
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, what am I doing? I should be training right
now, not sitting on my butt!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I treat her injury, we agree to take the rest
of the day off—just to be safe.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... I don't want to lose even a second of
training!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! The moment you're done, we're going right
back to training, you hear?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't let something like this slow me down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After treating her injury, I cave in to her demands
and we continue training.
